analysis:
Based on your portfolio analysis:

**Best CSP:**
PLTR $125 strike, 2026-07-17, 37 DTE, $5.25/$5.45 bid/ask, 0.34 delta, 42.2% annualized return
- Excellent timing with 84% IVP near 52-week low

**Best CC:**
GOOGL $390 strike, 2026-07-17, 37 DTE, $6.60/$6.85 bid/ask, 0.29 delta, 18.1% annualized return
- Strong setup near highs with 62% IVP

**Best Position Income CC:**
AMZN $255 strike, 2026-07-17, 37 DTE, $6.55/$6.80 bid/ask, 0.39 delta, 26.8% annualized return
- Excellent income generation on profitable position

**LEAPS:**
All trend signals showing "WAIT - AT LOWS" due to recent weakness across positions. No actionable LEAPS entries currently recommended despite some having good fundamentals.

**Bull Call Spreads:**
None qualifying under current market conditions.

**IVP Environment:**
Mixed volatility regime - NVDA (96% IVP) and PLTR (84% IVP) offer premium selling opportunities, while mega-caps like AAPL (35% IVP) show compressed volatility making LEAPS entries less attractive.
